name: Zucchini & Yellow Squash Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Zucchini, sliced into 1/4 inch thick rounds
1 1/2 cups Crookneck squash, sliced into 1/4 inch thick rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium-low heat.
2. Add onion, shallots, and garlic to the pan. Cook until the onion is translucent, stirring occasionally for about 10 minutes.
3. Stir in flour and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Add zucchini and crookneck squash to the mixture. Cook until softened, stirring frequently for about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in stock, cream, basil, and oregano.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
